patternCompliance.note: get_reverse_dependency_files uses numbered params ($f0..$fN) matching existing get_all_relationships_by_types pattern
No new deps; kuzu remains sole external dep
No new imports at module level

performanceFindings.description: Affected unchanged files parsed sequentially (not with ThreadPoolExecutor). For typical incremental reindexes this set is small; could optimize later if profiling shows bottleneck.

principleNotes.note: Only index() and storage touched. No drive-by edits.
Reuses existing edge phase functions. New storage methods follow established patterns.
py_compile and grep verification ran with fresh output.

evidence: Plan goal: P0 reindex edge loss + P1 HybridSearch cache. Implementation matches exactly.
Declared files: __init__.py, storage.py. Changed files: __init__.py, storage.py, issues.jsonl (memory tracking). No scope violations.
Phase progression: discuss -> plan -> implement -> review (correct).
Commit message matches plan: 'fix(graph): preserve cross-file edges on incremental reindex and reset search cache'.
stageReviews.notes: All micro-steps executed. TDD waived per plan (kuzu unavailable in dev/test). py_compile verification passed.

findings.description: remove_edges_from_file() deletes ALL outgoing edges from affected files (including edges to other unchanged files), then rebuilds them all. Slightly wasteful but correct and simple. A targeted deletion (only edges to changed-file nodes) would be more efficient but adds complexity.

evidence: storage.py: get_reverse_dependency_files() uses parameterized Cypher, guards empty input, returns DISTINCT paths.
storage.py: remove_edges_from_file() reuses exact same MATCH pattern as remove_nodes_by_file() first query.
__init__.py: Reverse deps collected BEFORE node removal (edges still exist at that point).
__init__.py: affected_fps filtered to current_paths and excludes changed files (no double-processing).
__init__.py: Edge rebuild runs only edge phases (imports/calls/heritage/types/exports), NOT process_symbols/process_structure.
__init__.py: _hybrid_search = None placed at top of index(), before walk. Correct sentinel protocol.
Edge cases handled: empty new_or_changed (early return), new files (excluded from changed_fps), deleted affected files (excluded by current_paths).
stageReviews.notes: Clean, minimal changes. Follows existing code patterns. No new dependencies.
